_publications._publicationTitle: Burden of adult neurofibromatosis 1: development and validation of a burden assessment tool.

_contextSnippet: The test-retest reliability was obtained on 23 evaluable subjects (Day 1 and Day 10), demonstrating good reproducibility. The intraclass correlation of each dimension was > 0.85 for each domain.
details: Test-retest reliability demonstrated good reproducibility with intraclass correlation >0.85 for each domain
